blocks.content: In this milestone, you navigate to Fleet Management within Grafana Cloud to access your collector fleet. Fleet Management provides a centralized interface for viewing collector status, health metrics, and configuration details across your entire deployment.
Sign in to your Grafana Cloud instance.
On the **Inventory** tab, view the collector fleet overview showing all registered collectors.
The Fleet Management page displays a list of collectors showing their current health status and basic metadata.
In the next milestone, you learn how to select collectors to configure with remote attributes.
